title: athyrium microphyllum
intro: Athyrium microphyllum, also known as the maidenhair fern, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Athyrium genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athyrium microphyllum include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be made into a tincture for medicinal purposes.
